title: Replace About section profile photo with uploaded real portrait

requirements.summary: Replace the current profile photo in AboutSection.tsx with the uploaded portrait image (debraj-profile.dim_400x480.jpg) while preserving all existing styling
acceptanceCriteria: The About section profile photo displays the exact uploaded portrait of Debraj Paul (young man with glasses, teal background, white t-shirt).
The photo container retains its original shape, border, and shadow styling.
No AI-generated or placeholder portrait is used.

file_operations.description: Update the profile photo img element to use the uploaded portrait at frontend/public/assets/generated/debraj-profile.dim_400x480.jpg as the src attribute. Locate the img element within the photo container div (the second child div of the main flex container) and replace its src value with '/assets/generated/debraj-profile.dim_400x480.jpg'. Preserve all existing className, alt text, width, height, and other attributes to maintain the rounded corners, border, shadow, and responsive styling.
